name: Apple Crunch Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup apple (wash and core apples; shred)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 3/4 cup flour, 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons baking powder, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1 tablespoon cinnamon into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in the vegetable shortening until fine crumbs form.
3. Combine the egg and milk in a separate bowl.
4. Add the egg and milk mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Stir in the shredded apple.
6. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin cups, filling 2/3 full.
7. Sprinkle with nut crunch topping.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
NUT CRUNCH TOPPING:
1. In a small bowl, mix together 1/4 cup packed brown sugar, 1/4 cup chopped pecans, and 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon.
